subcodes.first_line: Verily God, His angels, His chosen ones, His messengers and His loved ones glorify them that have drunk from the Kawthar of steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الله و ملیکته و اصفیائه و سفرائه و اولیائه یکبرون الذین شربوا کوثر الاستقامة
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
